title: ABC Song for Kids | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
CLAP CLAP! Benny marches A B C down the street!
Sing a cheerful alphabet song with Benny in a bright cartoon parade.
Toddlers and preschoolers hear simple letter words from A to C.
Kid-safe nursery rhyme fun for ages 2-8 in American English.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
